## Description

Integrate Self Protocol's ZK-powered agent identity to enhance privacy and verifiability for the VeilTrader agent. This will allow the agent to prove properties about its identity without revealing sensitive information.

This enhancement targets the "Best Self Agent ID Integration" track ($1,000 1st place, $750 2nd place, $500 3rd place).

## Features to Implement

- Integrate Self Protocol contracts or SDK
- Add functions for the agent to prove identity properties using ZK proofs
- Implement selective disclosure of agent attributes
- Events for identity verification actions
- Tests for Self ID functionality
- Example usage in documentation

## Benefits

- Enhanced privacy through zero-knowledge proofs
- Selective disclosure of agent attributes
- Verifiable identity without revealing sensitive data
- Complements ERC-8004 for stronger identity guarantees

## References

- Self Protocol: https://self.id/
- Self Protocol Documentation: https://docs.self.id/
